description: Product Description Blue Canyon Blue Canyon 1x/2x Magnifying Round Plastic Free Standing Cosmetic Mirror ensure the highest quality and finishing combinations to suit any home. Clear plastic finished mirror offering an attractive addition to your bathroom or bedroom. Double sided with classic round mirror face design. Smooth 360 degree swivel design safe for children and the elderly. Safety Warning WARNING: Always use the mirror on a stable, flat surface. Be cautious when using the magnified side to avoid distorted views. Handle with care to prevent breakage.
